Concrete implementations handle protocol-specific logic.         Why an adapter?         - Vault logic doesn't change when switching Aave \u2194 Morpho         - Can deploy multiple adapters and migrate between them         - Testable with mock adapter (no mainnet fork needed)         Terminology:           collateral = sUSDat deposited to lending protocol           debt       = USDC borrowed against collateral           healthFactor = (collateral \u00d7 liquidationThreshold) / debt","kind":"dev","methods":{"borrow(uint256)":{"params":{"amount":"Amount of USDC to borrow (6 decimals)"}},"depositCollateral(uint256)":{"params":{"amount":"Amount of sUSDat to deposit (6 decimals)"}},"repay(uint256)":{"params":{"amount":"Amount of USDC to repay (6 decimals)"}},"withdrawCollateral(uint256)":{"params":{"amount":"Amount of sUSDat to withdraw (6 decimals)"}}},"title":"ILendingAdapter","version":1},"userdoc":{"kind":"user","methods":{"borrow(uint256)":{"notice":"Borrow USDC against deposited collateral."},"collateralBalance()":{"notice":"Total sUSDat collateral deposited (6 decimals)."},"currentBorrowRate()":{"notice":"Current USDC variable borrow rate (WAD, annualized)."},"debtBalance()":{"notice":"Total USDC debt outstanding (6 decimals)."},"depositCollateral(uint256)":{"notice":"Deposit sUSDat as collateral on the lending protocol."},"healthFactor()":{"notice":"Current health factor (WAD). Returns type(uint256).max if no debt."},"liquidationThreshold()":{"notice":"Liquidation threshold for sUSDat collateral (WAD, e.g. 0.825e18)."},"maxBorrow()":{"notice":"Maximum borrowable USDC given current collateral (6 decimals)."},"repay(uint256)":{"notice":"Repay USDC debt."},"withdrawCollateral(uint256)":{"notice":"Withdraw sUSDat collateral from the lending protocol."}},"notice":"Abstraction over Aave/Morpho lending protocols.","version":1}},"settings":{"compilationTarget":{"src/interfaces/ILendingAdapter.sol":"ILendingAdapter"},"evmVersion":"cancun","libraries":{},"metadata":{"bytecodeHash":"ipfs"},"optimizer":{"enabled":true,"runs":200},"remappings":[":@openzeppelin/contracts/=lib/openzeppelin-contracts/contracts/",":erc4626-tests/=lib/openzeppelin-contracts/lib/erc4626-tests/",":forge-std/=lib/forge-std/src/",":halmos-cheatcodes/=lib/openzeppelin-contracts/lib/halmos-cheatcodes/src/",":openzeppelin-contracts/=lib/openzeppelin-contracts/"],"viaIR":true},"sources":{"src/interfaces/ILendingAdapter.sol":{"keccak256":"0xf9555ea1ab8f2a866c6f120a0770db7941a8a19ec5b6ffd34fd0e4cacd47a733","license":"BUSL-1.1","urls":["bzz-raw://a44d37dfa19e4fd33e5dfac56fcb7ad5c5b468ffa24ffc0a2928fae2d0a1d898","dweb:/ipfs/QmVYoe92uq93kPDz1uwZtgndHvrxhHFSL6c4Do57DgnZ9q"]}},"version":1}

params.amount: Amount of USDC to borrow (6 decimals)
Amount of sUSDat to deposit (6 decimals)
Amount of USDC to repay (6 decimals)
Amount of sUSDat to withdraw (6 decimals)

currentBorrowRate().notice: Current USDC variable borrow rate (WAD, annualized).

depositCollateral(uint256).notice: Deposit sUSDat as collateral on the lending protocol.

healthFactor().notice: Current health factor (WAD). Returns type(uint256).max if no debt.

liquidationThreshold().notice: Liquidation threshold for sUSDat collateral (WAD, e.g. 0.825e18).

maxBorrow().notice: Maximum borrowable USDC given current collateral (6 decimals).

withdrawCollateral(uint256).notice: Withdraw sUSDat collateral from the lending protocol.
